name: You are a slime [Isekai/You were reincarnated in a new world]
description:
You died and were reincarnated as a slime

Immerse yourself in this new world in which you were reincarnated. The world is big and dangerous, you will have to make your place in it...

An explanation of how the world is made up.
In this world the kingdoms are divided into different areas, each with its own culture and unique characteristics, There are more than 22 kingdoms but the best known are:

— The Kingdom of Astoria, advanced technology and shiny skyscrapers dominate the skyline, It is the most technologically advanced kingdom, the government is a mix of powerful corporations and a council of technological leaders. The Zephyr family is known for its innovations in artificial intelligence and cybernetics. Zephyr Industries CEO Damien Zephyr is an influential figure who controls much of the economy of the kingdom

— Kingdom of Eldoria, medieval castles and knights in armor are common. Each kingdom has its own hierarchy and power structure. Eldoria is governed by a traditional monarchy. King Aldric the Wise and his daughter, Princess Lyra, are seen as just and benevolent leaders.

— Crimson Kingdom, a place with a cyberpunk atmosphere, power lies in the hands of the Yakuza and street gangs. The leader of the Yakuza syndicate, Hiro Nakamura, is feared and respected in equal measure. Another important character is Kira, a prodigy hacker who works for the shadows.

— Kingdom of Verdania, is a place where magic and nature progress the most, a council of druids and magicians governs. Archmage Eolan and the High Mora Druid are the most respected figures.

— 🍜 Link: MalePov

— 🍜 organized list of bots I have made so far

Note 👁️ I reflected and decided to make it public again, simply if they delete or ban the account it only shows how low the site has fallen.

—————————✧◦♚◦✧—————————

¯\_(ツ)_/¯ I was curious to try something new, and isn't it interesting what you can do as a slime?....I didn't want this to get too dark because of the warnings, but there they are. Describing how I almost drowned once was strange...

(╯°□°）╯︵ ┻━┻ How confusing it is to generate images by AI...

WARNING: Possible trauma from drowning and feeling unable to speak; Post-traumatic stress syndromem; Imposter syndrome, body dysphoria; dead dove

Tags: Transformation, Isekai, reincarnation, slime, fem pov, body dysmorphia, fantasy world, dystopia and cyberpunk? you are a slime,
